The 'sections' array is ordered — render top to bottom.
Every section has a 'pattern' key that maps directly to a pattern
Extra patterns not in the template are documented inline.
'o8_config' contains the window.O8 script block values.

shared._note: These blocks are IDENTICAL across every page. Build them once in your renderer.

meta.title: About — ORTHOM8pro
meta.description: The team, mission, and philosophy behind ORTHOM8pro's sovereign-tier AI trading infrastructure.

sections.title: Built to serve
sections.body: ORTHOM8pro was founded on a single conviction: institutional investors deserve trading infrastructure that matches the precision and accountability of their mandates. We built the 11-node engine so you don't have to.

content.title: Capital should work as hard as
content.body: We exist to close the gap between institutional-grade trading intelligence and the investors who need it. Every decision in our pipeline is auditable, every position is protected, and every capital anchor is fully collateralised before a single signal fires.

sections.title: The principles that
sections.body: Not platitudes. Constraints we engineer into the system.

cards.title: No Trade Without Evidence
cards.body: The confidence gate does not negotiate. 72% composite score or the signal dies. We built this rule because speed without accuracy is just expensive noise.

cards.title: Capital Preservation First
cards.body: Every position is bounded by a hard stop-loss calculated from ATR-14. The circuit breaker monitors 9 conditions simultaneously. Protecting capital is not a feature — it is the architecture.

cards.title: Full Auditability
cards.body: Every pipeline run is logged to microsecond precision in PostgreSQL with TimescaleDB. Every AI reasoning chain is stored verbatim. If a regulator or investor asks why a trade was placed, we show them the exact data that made the decision.

cards.title: Sovereign Responsibility
cards.body: We do not manage your capital. We provide the infrastructure for it to manage itself, within hard institutional limits you set. Control never leaves your hands.

sections.title: The people behind
sections.body: A small, exacting team of engineers, quants, and risk architects.

members.name: Adewale Okafor
members.bio: 15 years building trading infrastructure at tier-1 prime brokers. Designed the 11-node pipeline from scratch. Responsible for the confidence gate and circuit breaker logic.

members.name: Chioma Adeyemi
members.bio: MSc Computational Finance, LSE. Designed the reality-adjusted projection model and the 6-factor confidence scoring framework. Maintains all win-rate and slippage benchmarks.

members.name: Emeka Nwosu
members.bio: Former NLP researcher. Built the Claude Sonnet 4 integration for regime detection and sentiment scoring. Responsible for the black-swan detection system and RL execution node.

members.name: Fatima Al-Rasheed
members.bio: Former sovereign wealth fund analyst. Manages all partner onboarding, capital tier structuring, and investor reporting. Speaks Arabic, English, and French.

steps.title: Pipeline Architecture
steps.body: The 11-node pipeline was designed around a single constraint: every decision must be explainable. Each node writes a structured log to PostgreSQL. AI reasoning chains are stored verbatim. No black boxes.

steps.title: Data Infrastructure
steps.body: 23 PostgreSQL tables, 7 TimescaleDB hypertables, 4 analytical views. Market snapshots, L2 order book depth, options Greeks, analyst ratings, and AI sentiment scores are all stored with nanosecond precision.

steps.title: AI Integration
steps.body: Claude Sonnet 4 powers three nodes: regime detection (every 15 min), sentiment scoring (per run), and RL execution (per trade). Total token budget scales from $65/mo at MVP tier to $1,200/mo at Full Institutional.

steps.title: Execution Layer
steps.body: All trade orders are routed through the IBKR TWS API. The RL execution node selects order type based on real-time L2 spread and ATR volatility. Average execution latency: 380ms. Average slippage at $2K tier: 22bps.

sections.heading: Understand the engine.
sections.body: Read the full architecture documentation or submit your first asset for a complimentary liquidity audit.

For institutional partners, prime brokers, family offices, and sovereign wealth funds interested in a structured capital anchor arrangement.

content.body: Our team operates across Lagos, London, Dubai, and Singapore. All client-facing communication is conducted in English. Documentation support available in Arabic and French on request.

meta.title: Compliance — ORTHOM8pro
meta.description: ORTHOM8pro's regulatory framework, risk disclosures, data governance policies, and institutional compliance documentation.

sections.title: Compliance is not
sections.body: Every system decision is logged, every capital position is bounded by hard rules, and every investor relationship is governed by executed documentation. This page is the authoritative reference for our regulatory and legal framework.

sections.title: Our regulatory
sections.body: ORTHOM8pro is a technology infrastructure provider, not a registered investment adviser or fund manager. Understanding this distinction is essential for all institutional partners.

callouts.title: Technology Provider — Not Investment Adviser
callouts.body: ORTHOM8pro provides algorithmic trading infrastructure and data pipeline technology. We do not manage, hold, or have discretionary authority over client capital. All trading decisions made using our infrastructure remain the sole responsibility of the client or their appointed investment manager.

callouts.title: No Public Solicitation
callouts.body: Our services are available exclusively to institutional clients who initiate contact through formal channels. We do not solicit retail investors, general members of the public, or any entity below institutional classification as defined under applicable financial regulation.

callouts.title: Jurisdiction
callouts.body: ORTHOM8pro operates under the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria. International partners are served under their own applicable regulatory frameworks. Clients in regulated jurisdictions (UK, UAE, EU) are responsible for ensuring their use of our technology infrastructure complies with local financial regulation.

items.title: Capital at Risk
items.body: All trading activity involves substantial risk of loss. Past performance of the ORTHOM8pro pipeline, including all projected ROI figures shown in our materials, is based on simulation and historical backtesting. Projected figures are illustrative only. Actual returns will differ materially from projections due to market conditions, execution variance, data quality, and factors beyond the control of the pipeline.

detail_blocks.label: Guarantee
detail_blocks.text: No returns are guaranteed under any circumstance

items.callout: ORTHOM8pro makes no representation that any capital tier will generate returns consistent with projected figures. Institutional partners must conduct independent due diligence.

items.title: AI Model Limitations
items.body: The pipeline uses Claude Sonnet 4 (Anthropic) for regime detection, sentiment scoring, and RL execution. AI models are probabilistic systems. They may produce incorrect classifications, miss black-swan events, or underperform in market conditions not represented in their training data. The confidence gate threshold (72%) is a probabilistic filter, not a guarantee of trade success.
items.callout: When AI nodes are unavailable, the pipeline degrades gracefully to neutral sentiment scores. This reduces signal quality and may reduce trade frequency. Capital protection mechanisms remain active.

items.title: Data Provider Dependency
items.body: The pipeline depends on third-party data providers including Scraper API, Finnhub, FMP, Alpha Vantage, Polygon.io, ORATS, and Databento. Service outages, API rate limits, or data quality degradation from any provider will reduce pipeline completeness and may suppress trade signals. We operate waterfall fallback logic and completeness scoring to mitigate this risk.

detail_blocks.label: Completeness gate
detail_blocks.text: Records below 40% completeness trigger circuit breaker

items.callout: A completeness_pct below 40% on any enriched record triggers the api_data_glitch circuit breaker condition, halting all trading until data quality is restored.

items.title: Execution & Slippage Risk
items.body: All trades are executed through the IBKR TWS API. Execution latency, order rejection, IBKR system outages, or changes to IBKR's API terms may prevent execution of signals that have cleared the confidence gate. Slippage costs are estimated in projections but will vary with market conditions. Our RL execution node minimises slippage but cannot eliminate it.
items.callout: IBKR connection failure triggers the circuit breaker after 3 consecutive retry failures. All open orders are cancelled. New signals are suppressed until connection is restored and manually cleared.

items.title: Systemic & Black Swan Risk
items.body: No quantitative system, regardless of sophistication, can fully anticipate systemic market dislocations, flash crashes, geopolitical shocks, or policy changes of exceptional magnitude. The circuit breaker and black-swan detection system are designed to limit exposure in these conditions, but cannot eliminate it.
items.callout: The black_swan_detected boolean, when TRUE, immediately triggers the ai_anomaly circuit breaker condition and halts all new signal generation. Previously opened positions are closed at market.

sections.title: How we handle
sections.body: All client data is governed under executed NDA from first contact. Our database stores four classes of information, each with defined access controls and retention policies.

rows: Price feeds, volume, open interest, public news
AI scores, regime states, enriched fields
All executed and paper trades, positions, P&L
Legal name, jurisdiction, asset details, email

sections.title: Nine conditions.
sections.body: The circuit breaker is the most important component in the pipeline. It has no failure mode — it is designed to halt all activity rather than degrade gracefully.

items.title: Daily Loss Limit
items.body: Any single instrument loses more than 2% of portfolio NAV in a single trading day.

items.title: Portfolio VaR Breach
items.body: Portfolio-level 1-day 95% VaR exceeds 5% of total NAV.

items.title: AI Anomaly
items.body: Claude Sonnet 4 returns black_swan_detected = TRUE on any sentiment scoring run.

items.title: Fat Finger Detection
items.body: Any order has a quantity greater than 5× the standard position size for that instrument.

items.title: Flash Crash Detection
items.body: Any tracked instrument moves more than 3% in either direction within a 60-second window.

items.title: API Data Glitch
items.body: Any enriched record enters the confidence gate with completeness_pct below 40%.

items.title: Correlation Breach
items.body: Any two open positions achieve a rolling 20-day Pearson correlation exceeding 0.70.

items.title: Drawdown Limit
items.body: Portfolio NAV drawdown from peak exceeds a configured percentage threshold.

items.title: Manual Override
items.body: Any authorised operator triggers a manual halt via the IBKR dashboard or pipeline control interface.

meta.title: Evidence — ORTHOM8pro
meta.description: Verified partner results, performance attribution, and case studies from ORTHOM8pro's institutional capital programme.

sections.title: Performance you can
sections.body: These are not marketing claims. Each case study is based on a real institutional partner relationship, with verifiable capital structures and documented outcomes. Read the detail, then reach out.

sections.title: Four partners.
sections.body: Each engagement begins with an asset audit and ends with a capital tier assignment. Below is the full account of every institutional partnership to date.

partner.name: Thorne-Blackwood Capital
partner.quote: ORTHOM8pro eliminated our dependency on legacy prime brokers. The confidence gate alone saved us three blown positions in Q4 that our own quant desk would have taken.
partner.narrative: Thorne-Blackwood approached us with a specific problem: their existing quant infrastructure had no regime detection layer. Their momentum strategies were performing well in trending markets but suffering significant drawdown during mean-reverting periods. We onboarded them at the Professional tier, giving them access to the full 11-node pipeline including the Claude Sonnet 4 regime detection node. In Q4, the regime classifier correctly identified a mean-reverting environment 4 hours before their internal quant desk, allowing them to switch from momentum to mean-reversion playbook. Three momentum signals that would have resulted in net losses were rejected by the gate. Net alpha for Q4: +18.4%.

partner.name: NorthStar Motors Limited
partner.quote: We pledged our fleet as collateral. The asset audit was surgical — no bureaucracy, no ambiguity. Capital was deployed in 9 days from first contact.
partner.narrative: NorthStar Motors held $2.1M of automotive fleet assets with no liquid yield. Through our asset audit process, we structured a $450K capital anchor against 21.4% of the fleet's independently appraised value. The audit took 52 hours. Capital was deployed 9 days from first contact. Operating at the Semi-Pro tier, the pipeline generated +11.2% net alpha in its first quarter of operation, fully covering the infrastructure cost and returning 6× the monthly infrastructure cost in net profit.

partner.name: Oudh & Gold Commodities
partner.quote: The regime detection AI caught the Q3 mean-reversion shift 4 hours before our quant desk did. We adjusted our playbook and preserved the entire position.
partner.attribution: Tariq Al-Rasheed · Head of Quantitative Strategy
partner.narrative: Oudh & Gold engaged at our maximum capital anchor of $2M, deploying the full Institutional tier pipeline. Their primary use case was cross-asset signal generation across gold futures, crude oil, and equity index positions. In Q3, our regime detection AI classified a mean-reverting environment ahead of a significant correction in gold futures. The pipeline switched playbook from momentum to defensive posture. The position was protected. Year-to-date alpha: +14.7%. Notable: zero circuit breaker activations across 8 months of operation.

partner.name: Al-Maktoum Auto Group
partner.quote: We had $3M in luxury vehicle inventory generating zero yield. ORTHOM8pro structured a capital anchor in 11 days and turned idle assets into a productive institutional position.
partner.narrative: Al-Maktoum Auto Group held a $3M portfolio of luxury and ultra-luxury vehicles (Rolls-Royce, Lamborghini, Bentley) with zero yield. Our asset audit appraised the portfolio at full market value and structured a $800K capital anchor at 26.7% LTV. The Strategic tier pipeline was deployed, generating +8.9% net alpha in Q1 2025. The client has since indicated intent to expand to the full $2M Institutional anchor in H2 2025.

content.title: How performance figures
content.body: All alpha figures shown in our case studies are net of infrastructure costs, slippage, and commissions. They are calculated from IBKR trade logs, not projections. They are not audited by a third party — we encourage all partners to conduct independent verification.

cards.quote: ORTHOM8pro eliminated our dependency on legacy prime brokers. The confidence gate alone saved us three blown positions in Q4.
We pledged our fleet as collateral. The asset audit was surgical — no bureaucracy, no ambiguity. Capital was deployed in 9 days from first contact.
The regime detection AI caught the Q3 mean-reversion shift 4 hours before our quant desk. We adjusted our playbook and preserved the entire position.
cards.attr: Tariq Al-Rasheed · Head of Quantitative Strategy

sections.heading: Ready to become
sections.body: The next institutional audit slot is open now. Submit your asset and receive a full liquidity simulation within 48–72 hours.

meta.title: Submit an Asset — ORTHOM8pro
meta.description: Submit your illiquid asset for a full institutional liquidity audit. ORTHOM8pro simulates your path to capital across all 6 infrastructure tiers.

sections.title: Turn your illiquid asset into a
sections.body: Submit your asset for a complimentary institutional audit. Our 11-node pipeline simulates your capital potential across all 6 infrastructure tiers. Delivered as a formal report within 48–72 hours under NDA.

items.title: Submission Acknowledged
items.body: You receive an automated confirmation within minutes. Your submission is assigned to a senior analyst and classified under NDA.

items.title: Asset Verification
items.body: We verify the asset class, jurisdiction, and estimated value. We may request supporting documentation (title deeds, valuation reports, fleet registers, etc.).

items.title: Liquidity Simulation
items.body: The 11-node pipeline simulates your capital potential across all 6 infrastructure tiers at 4 capital levels ($10K, $25K, $50K, $100K). Reality-adjusted projections are generated.

items.title: Formal Report Delivered
items.body: A PDF report is delivered to your email within 48–72 hours. The report includes your recommended capital tier, projected monthly alpha, collateral LTV, and onboarding steps.

items.title: Onboarding Call (Optional)
items.body: For submissions above $100K, a 30-minute onboarding call with our Head of Institutional Relations is scheduled automatically.

content.title: What assets
content.body: We work with illiquid assets that have a verifiable, independently appraised market value above $50,000. The asset does not need to be sold — it serves as collateral for the capital anchor.

sections.title: Begin your
sections.body: Complete the form below. All fields marked * are required. Submission takes under 3 minutes.

fields.label: Asset Description *
fields.placeholder: Describe the asset in 2–3 sentences. Include key details such as location, condition, and any existing encumbrances.

form.consent: By submitting this form, I confirm this is an institutional enquiry and consent to ORTHOM8pro contacting me regarding the audit. All data is handled under mutual NDA from first contact.
form.note: No fees. No commitment. Formal PDF report delivered within 48–72 hours.

items.title: Do I need to sell or transfer my asset?
items.body: No. Your asset remains in your possession. It serves as collateral for the capital anchor — we structure the capital position against an agreed percentage of the asset's independently appraised value. Your asset is never transferred to ORTHOM8pro.

items.title: What is the minimum asset value?
items.body: The minimum independently appraised asset value we work with is $50,000. This allows us to structure a viable capital anchor at our Seed Growth tier ($25K). For larger tiers, higher asset values are required to maintain our maximum 30% LTV threshold.

items.title: How is the projected ROI calculated?
items.body: Projected figures use our reality-adjusted model: win rate × risk-reward ratio × trades per month × position size, with deductions for slippage, API costs, and a noise/error haircut. All figures include a ±28% variance band. These are illustrative projections, not guaranteed returns.

items.title: What happens if the pipeline loses money?
items.body: The circuit breaker will halt trading before losses approach capital-threatening levels. The 2% daily loss limit per instrument and 5% portfolio VaR threshold are hard limits. Your collateral asset is not at risk from trading losses — the capital anchor is sized such that maximum drawdown scenarios are fully covered by liquid reserves.

items.title: How long does the audit take?
items.body: The formal liquidity simulation and report generation takes 48–72 hours from submission. If we need additional documentation (independent valuation, title deeds, etc.) the process may take up to 5 business days.

items.title: Is the audit free?
items.body: Yes. The initial asset audit and liquidity simulation are provided at no cost as part of our client acquisition process. Fees apply only after formal onboarding into a capital tier, and are structured as the monthly infrastructure cost for your chosen tier.

sections.heading: Your asset should be
sections.body: Institutional audit. No fees. No commitment. A formal report in 48–72 hours.

meta.title: Performance — ORTHOM8pro
meta.description: Six infrastructure tiers, reality-adjusted projections, and the full ROI matrix for ORTHOM8pro's institutional trading pipeline.

sections.title: Six tiers. One
sections.body: Every infrastructure tier runs the same 11-node architecture. What changes is the quality of data, depth of AI reasoning, and slippage reduction. Higher investment in infrastructure unlocks higher signal accuracy and higher net alpha.

sections.title: Choose your
sections.body: Each tier unlocks additional nodes, lower slippage, and better AI context. All tiers run on the same core pipeline — the difference is signal quality.

sections.title: Reality-adjusted
sections.body: Monthly projected profit at 2% position size, 21 trading days, with reality factors per tier: API uptime, signal latency, fill rates, regime filter utilisation, correlation clustering, and error haircut. ±28% variance applied to all figures.

items.title: Base Profit Formula
items.body: Monthly profit (mid) = (wins × reward − losses × risk − slippage_cost) × error_factor. Where: wins = trades_month × win_rate, losses = trades_month × (1 − win_rate), reward = position_size × risk_reward_ratio, risk = position_size, slippage_cost = trades_month × position_size × slippage_bps.

detail_blocks.label: Position size
detail_blocks.text: 2% of starting capital (fixed across all tiers)

items.callout: All projected figures are illustrative. Actual returns will differ due to market conditions, execution variance, and factors outside the pipeline's control.

items.title: Six Reality Adjustment Factors
items.body: The error_factor applied to gross P&L accounts for six real-world degradation sources that simple backtests ignore: API uptime (provider SLAs), signal latency (pipeline execution time vs ideal), fill rates (percentage of signals that actually fill at intended price), regime filter utilisation (percentage of time regime detection is active and accurate), correlation clustering (portfolio concentration penalty), and error/noise haircut (bad data days, API glitches).
items.callout: The error factor is the single most important honest variable in our model. It acknowledges that no system operates at theoretical maximum efficiency. All competitor projections you have seen probably omit this factor.

sections.heading: Find your optimal
sections.body: Submit your asset for a formal audit. We will recommend the tier that maximises your net alpha against your capital base and infrastructure budget.
